questions.text: Electromagnetic waves travel in vacuum with speed:
questions.explanation: Electromagnetic waves travel in vacuum with speed c = 3×10^8 m/s (speed of light)

questions.text: Electromagnetic waves are transverse in nature.
questions.explanation: EM waves are transverse - the electric and magnetic fields oscillate perpendicular to the direction of propagation.

questions.text: The electromagnetic spectrum includes radio waves, visible light, and ________ rays.
questions.explanation: EM spectrum in order of increasing frequency: radio, microwave, infrared, visible, UV, X-rays, gamma rays

questions.correctAnswer: Displacement current is the current due to changing electric field. Id = ε0(dΦE/dt)
questions.explanation: Maxwell introduced displacement current to make Ampere's law consistent. It arises from changing electric flux.
